name: IT-W4-l10n-accommodation: view-self fallback so a child never sees a parent's accommodation
description: W4 (solo Item) — add a view-self fallback so a child does not see a parent's accommodation copy (F-163, MMT-ADR-0008). Rides the guardian-authority model established in WP-W1-authority-graph. The single in-scope finding from the l10n-a11y-mobile workstream (the other 34 rows are out-of-scope, O §2).
acceptanceCriteria: A child profile never renders a parent's accommodation copy. Findings: F-163. Source of truth: _wip/identity-foundation/2026-06-09-phase-o-master-plan.md §1 IT-W4-l10n-accommodation (commit 23d0c01ad)
